description: Implement BPHS house significations analysis, KP sub-lord theory assessment, and Bhava/House analysis tabulation for both boy and girl charts.
steps: Create js/bphs.js implementing: (a) All 12 house significations per BPHS (Brihat Parashara Hora Shastra) - 1st house (self, personality, health), 2nd (wealth, family, speech), 3rd (siblings, courage, communication), 4th (mother, property, happiness), 5th (children, intelligence, romance), 6th (enemies, disease, debt), 7th (spouse, marriage, partnerships), 8th (longevity, transformation, occult), 9th (fortune, dharma, father), 10th (career, status, authority), 11th (gains, friends, desires), 12th (losses, moksha, foreign). (b) Planet-in-house analysis showing how each planet's placement affects marriage prospects. (c) Lord of each house and its placement analysis. (d) Yogas relevant to marriage (Kalatra yoga, etc.).

Create js/kp.js implementing: (a) KP (Krishnamurti Paddhati) sub-lord theory - each house cusp has a sign lord, star lord, and sub lord. (b) Sub-lord table for all 249 sub-divisions. (c) Ruling planet analysis for marriage (7th cusp sub-lord significance). (d) KP significators calculation - planet as significator of houses through ownership, occupation, and star-lordship. (e) Assessment of marriage promise based on 2nd, 7th, and 11th house significators.

Wire up the Bhava/House Analysis tab in app.js to display a comprehensive table showing: house number, sign on cusp, cusp degree, lord, star lord, sub lord, planets in house, and aspects received - for both boy and girl charts side by side.
Wire up the BPHS Assessment tab to show: house significations table, planet-house placement analysis, marriage-relevant yogas found, overall BPHS compatibility assessment with scoring.

Wire up the KP Assessment tab to show: cusp sub-lord table for all 12 houses, significator analysis for houses 2-7-11 (marriage houses), ruling planets at the time of query, KP-based marriage promise analysis for both charts.
acceptance_criteria: Bhava/House Analysis tab shows complete house details for both charts in tabular format
BPHS Assessment tab shows house significations, yoga analysis, and compatibility scoring
KP Assessment tab shows sub-lord table, significator analysis, and marriage promise evaluation
All three tabs populate correctly when birth details are submitted
Calculations follow established BPHS and KP astrology principles
verification: Enter sample birth details and verify Bhava/House Analysis tab shows data for all 12 houses for both charts
Verify BPHS Assessment tab shows significations and yoga analysis
Verify KP Assessment tab shows sub-lord details and significator analysis
Check browser console for errors during calculation
findings: Implemented BPHS and KP modules successfully. BPHS covers all 12 house significations, planet-in-house marriage effects, house lord placement analysis, and 12+ marriage-relevant yogas (Kalatra, Manglik, Love Marriage, etc.) with scoring. KP module implements 243-entry sub-lord table (27 nakshatras x 9 subs covering all 360 degrees), cusp sub-lord calculation for all 12 houses, significator analysis through occupancy/ownership/star-lordship, 7th cusp sub-lord marriage promise assessment, and ruling planets analysis. The Bhava tab shows comprehensive side-by-side house analysis with sign, cusp degree, lord, star lord, planets in house, and aspects for both charts. All code passes Node.js syntax checks and functional integration tests.
